---
title: Reproducible and Dynamic Reporting with R and Quarto - Getting started
subtitle: Workshop at UZH
sidebar: false
date: last-modified
author: 
  - name: 'Gorka Fraga Gonzalez'
    orcid: 0000-0002-1857-8607

  - name: 'Fabio Molo'
    orcid: 0000-0001-9320-5854

  - name: 'Samuel Pawel'
    orcid: 0000-0003-2779-320X

#about:
  #template: broadside
  #image: "assets/narrow_alps.png"
  #image-title: ALPS
  #image-shape: rectangle
  #links:
    #- text: CRS
     # href: "https://www.crs.uzh.ch/en.html"
  #  - icon:  git
  #    aria-label: Gitlab
  #    href: "https://gitlab.uzh.ch/crsuzh/workshop-quarto-2025-uzh"
#    - icon: linkedin
#      aria-label: "LinkedIn"
 #     href: "https://www.linkedin.com/company/center-for-reproducible-science"  
listing:
  #categories: true
  type: grid
  
  id: main-listing
  fields: [title]
  #image-height: 210px
  grid-columns: 4
  #grid-item-align: center
  #sort-ui: true
  #filter-ui: true
  sort: false  
  contents: 
    - ./instructions/*.qmd
    # Temporarily hidden sections
    # - ./slides_intro/*.qmd
    # - ./demo/*.qmd
    # - ./slides_outro/*.qmd
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

- Date: 15 May 2025, 14:15 -- 17:00
- Location: University of Zurich, room RAA-E-30

In this workshop, the Center for Reproducible Science of the University of Zurich will introduce the participants to writing reproducible manuscripts and analyses using R and Quarto. Such dynamic reporting tools help researchers make their analyses transparent, shareable, and reproducible, and avoid error-prone and laborious copying and pasting of numbers, tables, figures, and other results.

The workshop will begin with an introductory presentation on the purpose and fundamentals of dynamic reporting. The second part is hands-on, and participants are supported to follow along on their own computers and produce a minimally viable reproducible report. Finally, we will demonstrate an advanced publishing workflow using version control and containerization.

# Installation Instructions and Slides

::: {#main-listing}
:::
